dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used price_pos_20 (Donchian position) to approximate '50% of measured intraday range' entry. Used macd_hist as proxy for momentum acceleration. Exit conditions: 50% profit target approximated as 0.5% returns for intraday, stop-loss set to 3R (3% absolute). Time-based hold limited to 6 hours via hold_hours_max parameter. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on momentum direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Used price_pos_20 (Donchian position) to approximate '50% of measured intraday range' entry. Used macd_hist as proxy for momentum acceleration. Exit conditions: 50% profit target approximated as 0.5% returns for intraday, stop-loss set to 3R (3% absolute). Time-based hold limited to 6 hours via hold_hours_max parameter. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on momentum direction.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter only in the zone of greatest momentum/highest probability and exit before the move exhausts, rather than attempting to capture the entire move from extreme to extreme.
